gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/317)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/317)
text: يُؤْخَذُ طِينُ قَبْرِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) مِنْ عِنْدِ الْقَبْرِ عَلَى سَبْعِينَ ذِرَاعاً .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Razaqallah Bin Abu Al A’ala, from Suleyman Bin Umar Al Sarraj, from one of our companions who said,
‘You can take the clay of the grave of Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> from the grave up to (a distance of) seventy cubits’ (70 square yards).
en.sarwar: 5. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Rizq Allah ibn abu al-‘Ala’ from Sulayman ibn ‘Umar al-Sarraj from certain individuals of our people who has said the following: “Clay of the grave of al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, can be taken from within a seventy square yard area.”
